title: T-038 — active-WOs + WO materials + suggest-LP APIs (06-d)
prompt:
# T-038 — production active-WOs + materials + suggest-LP

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.4 FR-SC-BE-043/045/046
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land `GET /active-wos` (list IN_PROGRESS WOs filtered by user site+line context), `GET /wo/:id/materials` (BOM expected materials with multi-source — stock + upstream_wo_output), and `POST /warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp` for SCN-080 Consume top-5 FEFO ranking.

## Implementation contract
1. GET /production/scanner/active-wos: status=IN_PROGRESS, RLS site_id+line_id; payload `{ id, number, planned_qty, actual_qty, consumed_count, output_count, progress_pct }`.
2. GET /production/scanner/wo/:id/materials: BOM snapshot per 03-TECH §7 with material_source per line + LP suggestions top 3 FEFO.
3. POST /warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp body `{ wo_id, wo_material_id, qty_needed, warehouse_id }` → top 5 FEFO-ranked LP suggestions.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/production/scanner/active-wos/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/production/scanner/wo/[id]/materials/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/production-execute.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/production-active-wos.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two WOs IN_PROGRESS on the user's line and one on a different line, when GET /active-wos runs, then only the two on the user's line are returned
2. Given a WO with 3 BOM lines (1 stock RM, 1 stock RM, 1 upstream_wo_output intermediate), when GET /wo/:id/materials runs, then each line carries its material_source and the upstream_wo_output line has empty stock LP suggestions but a non-empty 'projected_intermediate' field
3. Given POST /warehouse/scanner/suggest-lp for a material with 8 candidate LPs, when the response returns 200, then it carries exactly 5 LPs ordered by ascending expiry (FEFO)

## Test strategy
- RED: write production-active-wos.test.ts asserting site+line filter + BOM materials shape + top-5 FEFO before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/production-active-wos'

## Risk red lines
- Do not return WOs outside the user's site+line context
- Do not omit material_source per BOM line
- Do not return more than 5 LP suggestions on suggest-lp

pipeline_inputs.description: Three GET endpoints feeding SCN-080/081 + suggest-LP top-5 FEFO; site+line scoped.
pipeline_inputs.details: active-wos returns the WO summary cards, materials returns BOM lines with material_source distinction (stock vs upstream_wo_output) and top-3 FEFO suggestions, suggest-lp returns top-5 FEFO ranked LPs.
out_of_scope: Do not implement SCN-080/081 UI here (T-041)
